title: evalExpr
goal: Create src/eval.mjs exporting function evalExpr(s): evaluate an arithmetic expression of non-negative integers with + - * / and parentheses, honoring precedence; "/" is integer division truncating toward zero; whitespace is ignored.
notes: Golden must stress: precedence (2+3*4 === 14), parentheses overriding it ((2+3)*4 === 20), integer division (7/2 === 3), and ignored whitespace. Visible can test "1+2".
